subcodes.title: Words to Mr Herrigel, spoken on 1913-04-15
subcodes.first_line: Gather once a week in a public meeting. Before the meeting begins, one must read a prayer, afterward they may sing together an anthem or a song. This is optional.... Crystallization of forms will kill the spirit...
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @spirit and form in the administration, @unity of thought and belief, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
